mapper.select: SELECT A.구직번호 jobNo, A.참여자 participantName, CONVERT(varchar, A.생년월일, 23) birthDate, A.성별 gender, A.지점 branch, A.전담자_계정 counselorAccount, A.진행단계 progressStage, A.모집경로 recruitPath, A.참여유형 participationType, A.경력 career, A.학력 education, A.특정계층 specialClass, A.취업역량 employmentCapacity, (SELECT TOP 1 W.희망직무 FROM J_참여자관리_희망직무 W WHERE W.구직번호 = A.구직번호 ORDER BY W.희망순위) desiredJob, A.희망급여 desiredSalary, CONVERT(varchar, A.등록일, 23) participantRegDate, A.메모 memo, A.마감 closed, CONVERT(varchar, A.연계일, 23) linkDate, A.연계유형 linkType, A.연계비고 linkNote FROM J_참여자관리 A WHERE A.구직번호 = #{jobNo}
